component.name: tracker keeper
component.summary: One dashboard for software & firmware updates across everything you own

description.p: tracker keeper is one dashboard for the software and firmware updates across everything you own — apps, devices, and games, on every platform. It tells you what's new and links you straight to the changelog; it does NOT download, install, or apply updates — that stays entirely in your hands. It is a watchtower, not an updater. Because no single "latest version" API exists, tracker keeper is the uniform layer over a scattered world: it checks the sources it can automatically (GitHub releases, Arch packages, and more to come) and lets you track the rest by hand, sorted by what dropped today, with a notification when something new lands.

ul.li: Frosted chrome — A frameless, blurred, KDE-native window — rounded corners, a custom title bar, edge-resize and drag.
Token-driven design — One palette source with live re-theming, exported to JSON the app and the landing page share.
Batteries, wired — Single-instance, notifications, autostart and power inhibition — cross-platform and already plumbed.
Fork and own — Set your identity once. No upstream dependency, no framework lock-in — the code is yours.
